name: Ancient Tunnel
description: The tunnel continues north. The murals grow clearer here, less worn by time.{{mural_desc}}
ambient: Your footsteps echo too loudly in the confined space.
The silence here feels preserved, not natural.

description_snippets.mural_desc: The warrior now strikes the wyrm — the blade glowing, larger than before.

on_interact.look: The warrior drives the blade into the wyrm. The weapon is no longer small — it has grown, or changed. Light radiates from it.
on_interact.read: The wyrm recoils. The blade drinks something unseen.
